title: Twigonometry
description: A lib for building trees in-code
body: ![loaders](https://img.shields.io/badge/NEOFORGE%20%7C%20FABRIC-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&label=LOADERS&labelColor=73f09f&color=f2f7f7)   ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.21.1-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&label=VERSION&labelColor=73f09f&color=f2f7f7)   ## Twigonometry: *** A library mod to make generating trees in-code a little bit less painful. Lets you draw configurable simple shapes on a layer by layer basis with adjustable randomness, a decay check, custom attachments, utils and more. ## Usage: *** **If you're not a mod developer, this is a dependency mod!** If you are a mod developer, information on how to use it can be found on the [GitHub page](https://github.com/lethargistic/twigonometry).
